title: What could Silver Bell mean What do you think
display_title: What could Silver Bell mean What do you think
wikitext:
[]: What could Silver Bell mean? What do you think?             Quote Post by Marie » Sun Nov 26, 2017 5:40 pm I doubt there's an actual answer, but my theory is that it's a fast food chain haha. What are some of your ideas?

[]: Re: What could Silver Bell mean? What do you think?             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sun Nov 26, 2017 6:09 pm Google finds plenty of Silver Bell restaurants, a bakery, and the like. But looking to Japan in particular, the Silver Bell was/is a favoured meeting spot in Tokyo station , especially before the time of cell phones. So one could conjecture that it is a meeting place for those who get lost (yeah - not very convincing, I know, though Misato does get lost in the show!).

Article: What could Silver Bell mean What do you think
[]: What could Silver Bell mean? What do you think?             Quote Post by Marie » Sun Nov 26, 2017 5:40 pm I doubt there's an actual answer, but my theory is that it's a fast food chain haha. What are some of your ideas?

[]: Re: What could Silver Bell mean? What do you think?             Quote Post by pwhodges » Sun Nov 26, 2017 6:09 pm Google finds plenty of Silver Bell restaurants, a bakery, and the like. But looking to Japan in particular, the Silver Bell was/is a favoured meeting spot in Tokyo station , especially before the time of cell phones. So one could conjecture that it is a meeting place for those who get lost (yeah - not very convincing, I know, though Misato does get lost in the show!).
